scripts.dev: pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/observability' build && pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/kernel' build && (bun run --filter '@matrix-os/gateway' dev & bun run --filter '@matrix-os/proxy' dev & bun run --filter './shell' dev)
scripts.dev:shell: pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/observability' build && bun run --filter shell dev
scripts.dev:mobile-shell: pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/observability' build && pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/kernel' build && echo 'Mobile shell: http://localhost:3000/?launch=__terminal__' && (MATRIX_AUTH_ALLOW_INSECURE_DEV=1 bun run --filter '@matrix-os/gateway' dev & E2E_TEST_BYPASS=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_TEST_BYPASS=1 bun run --filter './shell' dev)
scripts.docker:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile full --profile obs up
scripts.docker:multi: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile full --profile multi up
scripts.docker:stop: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile full --profile obs --profile multi stop
scripts.docker:shell: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -u matrixos dev sh
scripts.test: sh -c 'pnpm --filter @matrix-os/observability build && pnpm --filter @matrix-os/kernel build && vitest run "$@"' --
scripts.test:coverage: sh -c 'pnpm --filter @matrix-os/observability build && pnpm --filter @matrix-os/kernel build && vitest run --coverage "$@"' --
scripts.test:e2e: sh -c 'pnpm --filter @matrix-os/observability build && pnpm --filter @matrix-os/kernel build && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts "$@"' --
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:build-kernel && pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/observability' exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/gateway' exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/platform' exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.json && pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/proxy' exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter '@matrix-os/edge-router' exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter desktop run typecheck
